Document
  └─ accordion
     ├─ accordion-item summary="What is wiremd?" expanded=false
     │  └─ paragraph "wiremd converts Markdown into HTML wireframes."
     ├─ accordion-item summary="Can I export to React?" expanded=false
     │  └─ paragraph
     │     ├─ text "Yes. Use "
     │     ├─ code "--format react" inline=true
     │     └─ text "."
     └─ accordion-item summary="Is it free?" expanded=false
        └─ paragraph "Yes, MIT licensed."
